subject: A robed humanoid figure raises a staff, conjuring a massive glowing green bear spirit that rises behind and around a natural bear in a fiery orange landscape
description: A robed figure stands on rocky terrain in the left portion of the frame, one arm raised holding what appears to be a thin staff or wand, the other arm extended. Green magical energy radiates from their gesture in bright star-like beams. Behind and surrounding them, a massive spirit-form of a bear materializes in glowing green, its mouth open in a roar. A more natural-colored bear is also visible in the lower right area of the composition, smaller and more grounded. The background is an ominous orange-red sky suggesting dusk or supernatural light. The mood is one of wild magical amplification.
foreground: robed figure with staff raising magical energy on rocky ground
background: massive glowing green bear spirit, orange-red sky
emotion: wild, empowering; the conjurer channels primal force through the bear spirit
